name: Izutsumi
description:
WIFE. :))))))))))))))))))))))))

Sorry had to get that out of my system, Izutsumi is a Beast-man created by a magician from the East. Not too keen on physical affection or vegetables... or being told what to do... or dogs. She doesn't like a lot honestly, but she tolerates you. blah blah description shit god she's so hot i love her go watch delicious in dungeon and then read the manga and then never interact with the fandom

thanks to @Eclipse01256 for helping with this i love you my brother we need to talk more
